aPropos.metaDescription: Story, mission, values and team behind AQWELIA, the AI copilot for pools and spas.
aPropos.heroTitle: AQWELIA, born from one obsession: clear water, no hassle.
aPropos.heroSubtitle: Three words, one mission: AQUA for water, WELL for wellbeing, AI for intelligence in service of your pool.
aPropos.storyP1: AQWELIA started from a simple observation: most pool owners spend more time maintaining their water than enjoying it. Manual testers are imprecise, online advice is contradictory, and pool pros are expensive for often-preventable issues.
aPropos.storyP2: Our team set out to put AI — computer vision, language models, deterministic chemistry calculations — at the service of homeowners. Not to replace pool pros, but to make users autonomous, informed and confident.
aPropos.storyP3: Today, AQWELIA supports pool and spa owners in 7 languages, across Europe and the United States, with one simple promise: clear, healthy, safe water, in under 5 minutes a week.
aPropos.nameAqua: For water, obviously. The pool and spa are at the heart of our product.
aPropos.nameWell: For wellbeing. Healthy water means worry-free swimming, no irritation, no risk.
aPropos.nameIa: For artificial intelligence. Vision, language, chemistry calculations — AI does the tedious work, you keep the decision.
aPropos.missionTitle: Make water care accessible, precise and stress-free — for everyone.
aPropos.missionBody: We want every owner, anywhere, to have access to a level of water analysis comparable to a professional pool pro. No jargon, no stress, no extra cost. That's our daily compass.
aPropos.val1Desc: Our calculations are deterministic and validated. No placebo: every recommendation is grounded in numerical values.
aPropos.val2Desc: No judgement, no alarmism. We explain, we reassure, we accompany.
aPropos.val3Desc: AI does the tedious work (strip reading, dosage calculation) so you keep the decision.
aPropos.val4Desc: Your data is encrypted, never sold. Chemical safety trumps every recommendation.
aPropos.val5Desc: 7 languages, metric and imperial units, mobile-first accessibility: everyone should be able to use AQWELIA.
aPropos.val6Desc: Fewer products, better dosed, at the right time. For your wallet and for the planet.

ph_drift.title: Your pH rises by {rate}/day for {days} days
ph_drift.message: Upward trend detected over the last {count} tests. Without action, the pH will drift out of the ideal range (7.0-7.4) and the chlorine will lose effectiveness.
ph_drift.action: Add pH- now to bring it back below 7.4.

algae.title: In {days} days: algae risk
algae.message_heat: Free chlorine at {chlorine} mg/L and heatwave forecast ({temp}°C). Warm water consumes chlorine faster and promotes algae growth.
algae.message_decline: Free chlorine at {chlorine} mg/L and declining. Without treatment, algae may appear within {days} days.
algae.action: Shock chlorine recommended now + continuous filtration 24h.
algae.phosphates_message: Phosphates feed algae. The hotter it gets, the higher the risk.
algae.phosphates_action: Use an anti-phosphate treatment and brush the walls.

cya_buildup.title: Your stabilizer reaches {value} mg/L
cya_buildup.message_high: CYA very high: chlorine becomes ineffective (chlorine lock). Renew {percent}% of the water to dilute.
cya_buildup.message_warn: CYA rising. Above 70 mg/L, chlorine loses effectiveness. Monitor and plan a partial renewal.

tac_instability.title: Your TAC varies a lot
tac_instability.message: Standard deviation of {stddev} mg/L over {count} measurements. An unstable TAC leads to erratic pH and difficult dosing.
tac_instability.action: Check the filtration and stabilize TAC between 80 and 120 mg/L.

storm_impact.title: Storm forecast tomorrow
storm_impact.message: {percent}% chance of storm. The storm dilutes chlorine and raises pH — check your water tonight.
storm_impact.action: Check free chlorine tonight before the storm. Boost filtration tomorrow.

scaling.title: High TH ({value} mg/L)
scaling.message: High calcium hardness. Risk of scale on equipment and waterline, especially in warm periods.
scaling.action: Consider an anti-scale sequestrant and check the pH (keep below 7.4).

corrosion.title: Aggressive water (low TH + low pH)
corrosion.message: TH {th} mg/L and pH {ph}. Aggressive water: equipment corrosion, possible foaming.
corrosion.action: Raise pH above 7.0 and add TH+ to reach 200 mg/L.

chlorine_depletion.title: High chlorine demand
chlorine_depletion.message: High sun exposure + intensive use = accelerated chlorine consumption.
chlorine_depletion.action: Monitor chlorine daily and adjust filtration.

growth.pipelineTitle: From captured lead to won customer.

growth.featuresMetaTitle: The 10 AI agents — AQWELIA Growth OS
growth.featuresMetaDescription: Detail of the 10 AI agents: objective, tools, budget, max actions and example output for each agent.
growth.featuresTitle: Ten AI agents, ten precise scopes.
growth.featuresSubtitle: Each agent has a unique objective, a bounded budget, a maximum number of actions and a confidence score. Everything is logged in AgentRun + AgentAction.
growth.agent1Objective: Propose a contract structure (Starter / Pro / Performance) based on the pool pro's profile: type, pool count, technician count, revenue goal.
growth.agent2Objective: Capture a lead from a source (website, widget, B2C, QR, campaign, partner, referral) by verifying GDPR consent and computing an initial score (0-100).
growth.agent3Objective: Ask 7 standard questions (pool type, volume, problem category, urgency, budget, last service, existing contract) and compute a 0-100 score + a tier.
growth.agent4Objective: Pre-diagnose the problem from the text description and photos. Identifies probable issues, severity, the required service type and the recommended pro specialty.
growth.agent5Objective: Rank available professionals by: specialty (50 pts) + capacity (20 pts) + rating (15 pts) + distance (15 pts). Assigns the best one to the lead.
growth.agent6Objective: Propose 3 time slots from your availability, accounting for the estimated duration (90 min default). Creates the appointment in 'proposed' status.
growth.agent7Objective: Trigger a reactivation sequence (cold_3step, warm_5step or lost_winback) over email, SMS and WhatsApp depending on the chosen scenario.
growth.agent8Objective: Generate a quote from the catalog (maintenance, repair, opening, closing, emergency, spa, renovation). Computes line items + total + validity (30 days).
growth.agent9Objective: Track source → commission with a multi-touch model (campaign 40%, referral 25%, partner 15%, website 10%…). Commission clamped between €25 and €150.
growth.agent9Example: { source: 'campaign', commission: { rate: 0.10, amount: 85, min: 25, max: 150 } }
growth.agent10Objective: Verify consent and GDPR rules before every sensitive action: consent present, less than 24 months old, sensitive data, non-EU transfers.
growth.qualificationMetaDescription: 7 standard questions, a 0-100 score, 4 tiers (cold / warm / hot / qualified) and automatic mapping to the next action.
growth.qualificationSubtitle: The Qualification agent asks 7 standard questions, computes a 0-100 score and determines the lead's tier. Each tier triggers a different action.
growth.qualificationHowDesc: The agent takes as input the answers to the 7 questions (with an optional weight per answer). It computes a weighted score, clamps it to 0-100, and determines the tier.
growth.qualificationTiersDesc: The tier determines the orchestrator's next automatic action.
growth.qualificationExampleDesc: A lead arrives with urgency=high, budget=€500-1500, contract=no. Here's how the agent qualifies it:
qualificationExampleSteps: Lead captured: urgency=high (+14 pts), budget €500-1500 (+7 pts), no contract (+1 pt) → initial score 52
The Qualification agent adds weights: urgency (×20) +14, budget (×10) +7, contract (×10) +1
Next action: run_matching → the Matching agent takes over

growth.pricingMetaTitle: Growth OS pricing — Starter, Pro, Performance
growth.pricingMetaDescription: Three plans: Growth Starter €59, Growth Pro €149, Performance €349. Success commission only (€25 – €150).
growth.pricingFaqA1: You only pay the commission if the lead results in a billed intervention. No lead = no commission. The commission is clamped between €25 (minimum) and €150 (maximum) per won lead, regardless of the billed amount.
growth.pricingFaqQ2: Can I change plans on the go?
growth.pricingFaqA2: Yes, anytime. The change takes effect at the next billing cycle. If you upgrade, you immediately get the new agents.
growth.pricingFaqA3: No. All Growth OS subscriptions are commitment-free, cancelable monthly. You only pay for the current month.
growth.pricingFaqQ4: What happens if I exceed the seat count?
growth.pricingFaqA4: You can add extra seats at €15/seat/month on Growth Starter, €12 on Growth Pro, and unlimited on Performance.
growth.pricingFaqQ5: Does the Performance plan include SSO?
growth.pricingFaqA5: Yes. The Performance plan includes SSO / SAML (Okta, Google Workspace, Azure AD), the integration API, the Compliance Supervisor and onboarding support.

growth.faqMetaTitle: Growth OS FAQ — 10 AI agents for pool pros
growth.faqMetaDescription: All the answers about Growth OS: the 10 agents, the pipeline, the marketplace, commission, GDPR compliance.
growth.faqTitle: Frequently asked questions about AQWELIA Growth OS
growth.faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know about the 10 AI agents, the pipeline, the marketplace and commission.
growth.faqA1: Growth OS is a growth engine for pool pros made of 10 specialized AI agents. Each agent has a precise scope (capture, qualification, diagnostic, matching, appointment, nurturing, quote, attribution, compliance) and works 24/7 to turn your leads into customers.
growth.faqQ2: How many agents does Growth OS have?
growth.faqA2: 10 agents: Offer Builder, Lead Capture, Qualification, Pre-diagnostic, Matching, Appointment Setter, Nurturing, Quote, Attribution and Compliance Supervisor. Each has an objective, tools, a budget and a maximum number of actions.
growth.faqA3: You only pay the commission if the lead results in a billed intervention. The rate depends on your plan (10% in Starter, 8% in Pro, 6% in Performance). The commission is clamped between €25 (minimum) and €150 (maximum) per won lead.
growth.faqA4: Yes. The Compliance Supervisor agent verifies consent before every sensitive action. The consent must be present and less than 24 months old. Non-EU transfers require Standard Contractual Clauses (SCC).
growth.faqQ5: Can I use my own email templates?
growth.faqA5: Yes. The Nurturing agent uses default templates (cold_intro, warm_recall, winback_we_miss_you, etc.) but you can customize them in the organization settings.
growth.faqA6: Seven sources: website, widget, B2C marketplace (AQWELIA consumers), QR codes, ad campaigns, partners and referrals. Each source is tracked by the Attribution agent.
growth.faqQ7: How long does it take to set up Growth OS?
growth.faqA7: Less than 5 minutes. You create your organization, plug in your sources (widget, QR codes) and the agents start capturing. Email templates and the quote catalog are ready out of the box.
growth.faqQ8: Does Growth OS work with my existing CRM?
growth.faqA8: The Performance plan includes an integration API (REST) to sync leads, appointments and quotes with your CRM or ERP. Starter and Pro plans use the built-in dashboard.
growth.faqQ9: What happens if an agent fails?
growth.faqA9: The agent logs its status (failed or escalated) in AgentRun. If the confidence score is low or a required action is unavailable, the agent escalates to a human (manual_dispatcher, manual_scheduler, dpo, etc.).
growth.faqQ10: Do my leads' data belong to me?
growth.faqA10: Yes. You remain the sole owner of your leads' data. We never resell any data. GDPR exports and deletions are available on request.
growth.faqQ11: Is Growth OS available outside France?
growth.faqA11: Yes. Growth OS is available in all EU countries. The Compliance Supervisor handles non-EU transfers via Standard Contractual Clauses (SCC) where applicable.
growth.faqQ12: How do I cancel my subscription?
growth.faqA12: From the dashboard, Settings tab > Subscription > Cancel. The cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing cycle. No commitment, no penalty.

careRecos.metaDescription: Discover how AQWELIA analyzes your water, your pool and your climate to recommend the right products at the right doses, with no conflict of interest.
careRecos.heroSubtitle: AQWELIA analyzes your water, your pool and your climate to recommend suitable products — no conflict of interest, no hidden commission.
careRecos.stepsTitle: 4 steps to recommend the right product
careRecos.stepsSubtitle: Our recommendation engine combines your field data, your profile and water chemistry.
careRecos.step1Text: Your water tests (pH, chlorine, TAC, TH, cyanuric acid), pool volume, filtration type and local weather conditions are aggregated.
careRecos.step2Text: AQWELIA determines your pool profile (water type, equipment, usage, season) to target relevant product categories.
careRecos.step3Text: Each product in the catalog is scored on 6 criteria: chemical compatibility, dosage, customer brand, budget, availability and reviews.
careRecos.step4Text: The top 3 products are suggested with the exact dosage, frequency and precautions. You keep the final choice.
careRecos.criteriaSubtitle: AQWELIA earns no commission on products. Our interest = your satisfaction.
careRecos.crit1Text: The product must not interact negatively with your current water (pH, chlorine, stabilizer).
careRecos.crit2Text: The dosage is calculated based on your pool real volume and the gap to close.
careRecos.crit3Text: If you already use a compatible brand, we prioritize it to avoid mixing.
careRecos.crit4Text: Three price tiers (economy, standard, premium) based on your declared profile.
careRecos.crit5Text: The product must be available from a partner near you.
careRecos.crit6Text: Real user reviews weight the score (ratings, review count, repurchase frequency).
careRecos.transparencyText: AQWELIA is a software vendor, not a product reseller. Suppliers cannot pay to appear higher in recommendations. Scoring is purely technical.
careRecos.ctaSubtitle: Enter your last water test and get personalized recommendations in 2 minutes.

redirectPages.dataSubtitle: How AQWELIA collects, uses and protects your personal data.
redirectPages.dataIntro: AQWELIA is GDPR-compliant (General Data Protection Regulation). This page summarizes your rights and how we process your data.
redirectPages.dataCollectText: We collect: email, first/last name (optional), pool and water-test data, photos (with your consent), anonymized usage data.
redirectPages.dataPurposeText: Your data is used to: provide the AQWELIA service, generate personalized recommendations, improve the product, send service emails (and marketing emails if you consented).
redirectPages.dataRetentionText: Your data is kept while your account is active, then 12 months after deletion (except legal obligations). Water tests are anonymized after 24 months.
redirectPages.dataRightsText: Under GDPR, you have rights to access, rectify, erase, restrict, port and object. Exercise them from your Preferences or by email at dpo@aqwelia.app.
redirectPages.dataConsentText: You can change your consents (marketing, analytics, emails) anytime from the app Preferences screen. A GDPR ledger records every action (grant/withdraw).
redirectPages.dataContactText: For any GDPR question: dpo@aqwelia.app. To file a complaint: your local Data Protection Authority.
